task_completion.description: The dashboard is named 'WoW Deployment Baseline'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'WoW Deployment Baseline' is visible at the top of the Graphite dashboard interface.

task_completion.description: Graph 1 is created with the correct title, aliases, and colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Web Traffic WoW' is present. Its legend shows 'Current Traffic' and 'Last Week Traffic'. The line for 'Last Week Traffic' is colored gray.

task_completion.description: Graph 2 is created with the correct title, aliases, and colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'ELB Requests WoW' is present. Its legend shows 'Current Requests' and 'Last Week Requests'. The line for 'Last Week Requests' is colored gray.

task_completion.description: Graph 3 is created with the correct title, aliases, and colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'RDS CPU WoW' is present. Its legend shows 'Current RDS CPU' and 'Last Week RDS CPU'. The line for 'Last Week RDS CPU' is colored gray.
There is a confirmation message that the dashboard was saved, or the dashboard name is visible in the saved dashboards list/finder, or the URL reflects the saved dashboard name.

integrity.description: The agent used the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Graphite web UI (e.g., adding graphs, configuring targets, editing dashboard properties) rather than writing a JSON file in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The graphs display actual time-series data
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs show plotted lines representing real data, not empty grids or static mockups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is 'WoW Deployment Baseline'. The task requires creating a Graphite dashboard with three specific graphs comparing current metrics to 1-week shifted metrics. The underlying time-series data (web traffic, ELB requests, RDS CPU) is real-world data sourced from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset.
